question: What was the total student enrollment for the school year starting in four years before the year (within 2017-2022) that has the lowest total ridership reported by the Rochester Genesee Regional Transportation Authority for the school district in the most populous city of Whitman County (2020 census)? 2.subquestion: What is the most populous city in Whitman County, Washington according to the 2020 census?
